case_title: ALLEN FARON et al VS. ST JOSEPH HOSPITAL et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-27-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT ST. JOSEPH HEALTH SYSTEM

NTC OF JOINDER AND JOINDER OF DEFT ST JOSEPH HEALTH SYSTEM IN DEFTS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT ST. JOSEPH HEALTH SYSTEM HEARING SET FOR OCT-27-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS KEVIN MOLANDER, M.D., RONALD CORDOVA, M.D., AND JOHN KELSEY, M.D.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO HUMBOLDT COUNTY. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS ORDERED TO PAY DEFENDANTS REASONABLE EXPENSES AND ATTORNEYS FEES INCURRED IN MAKING THIS MOTION TO TRANSFER. DEFENDANT MAY APPLY FOR THOSE FEES BY SEPARATELY NOTICED APPLICATION WITH PROPERLY SUPPORTING DECLARATION DETAILING THE REASONABLE AMOUNT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
